Best sales angle

Lead with a short website audit, then offer a free homepage mockup. Focus on visitor trust, clear calls to action, online giving for churches, and booking or quote requests for businesses.

Next build phase

Connect Google Places, PageSpeed Insights, Supabase, and AI-generated outreach once the MVP is deployed and reviewed.
